title: lomatium caruifolium var. purpureum
intro: Lomatium caruifolium var. purpureum, also known as purple lomatium or prairie lomatium, is a perennial plant in the carrot family native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiviral and antibacterial properties, which can help to combat infections and inflammation. The health benefits of Lomatium caruifolium var. purpureum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into a tincture, tea, or capsule, and can also be used in traditional medicine as a poultice or salve.
